Appearances:
Plaintiff McCormack Baron Management Services, Inc. is present. Represented by Gina Guitron.
Attorney Daniel Cheung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jackie Johnson is present.
Attorney Matthew representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Michele Wolf, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUN-11-2012 remains on calendar.
